source.title: Roles for the subiculum in spatial information processing, memory, motivation and the temporal control of behaviour

confidence_rationale: Subiculum-as-routing-hub synthesis. Supports MECH-272 routing layer being anatomically distinct from anchor representation, and provides the anatomical pathway by which an anchor-side MECH-287 broadcast component would reach VTA (per Lisman & Grace coupling). Mapping is supportive but interpretive; review is dated and predates much modern characterisation.
failure_signatures: If MECH-272 routing is implemented inside anchor representations rather than at a dedicated routing layer, it loses the biological pattern of CA1 anchor coding being functionally distinct from subicular fan-out routing.
Subicular characterisation has substantially advanced since 2009 (axis cells, boundary vector cells); substrate should not commit to the 2009 description of subicular code as canonical.

mapping.source_claim_statement: The subiculum is the principal output structure of the hippocampal formation, integrating CA1 output with parahippocampal/cortical inputs and routing the result via functionally distinct projections to NAc, mammillary bodies, septum, hypothalamus, PFC, and retrosplenial cortex. Subicular cells carry multi-dimensional codes (boundary, axis, context) distinct from CA1 place coding.
mapping.ree_translation: MECH-272 routing belongs at a dedicated layer downstream of the anchor, not inside the anchor itself -- mirroring subicular fan-out. The MECH-287 anchor-side broadcast component (per Lisman & Grace + Vinogradova) routes through a subiculum-analog stage to reach the VTA-equivalent broadcast generator. Anchor representations downstream of CA1 are mixed-selectivity over multiple dimensions, consistent with per-stream V_s as projection-readout.
mapping.mapping_caveat: Subicular characterisation has been substantially refined since 2009. Direct functional evidence for subiculum as obligate route for hippocampal-to-VTA novelty signaling is anatomical rather than functional. Substrate routing layer translation is interpretive.
mapping.source_context: Theoretical synthesis review of subicular spatial coding, memory function, motivational coupling, and temporal-context signals.

confidence_components.notes: Specialty journal review by leading subiculum researcher. Mapping fidelity moderate; the routing-hub architecture supports MECH-272 and the MECH-287 anchor-side pathway but is interpretive. Transfer risk moderate due to age and subsequent refinement.
